first_run.rationale: The score is identical between the two evaluations, and the reasoning is substantively unchanged. Both versions correctly identify the same strengths (full-stack, distributed systems) and the same concerns (lack of executive leadership, limited regulated fintech experience, and no team scaling track record). The differences in wording are minor and fall within the range of ordinary run-to-run noise, indicating the model did not alter its assessment based on the university's prestige.
